hooks.command:
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; o=$(conda run -n agentic-mediapulse ruff check . 2>&1); c=$?; fo=$(conda run -n agentic-mediapulse ruff format --check . 2>&1); fc=$?; if [ $c -ne 0 ] || [ $fc -ne 0 ]; then printf 'Ruff found issues (fix before continuing):
--- ruff check ---
%s
--- ruff format --check ---
%s
' "$o" "$fo" >&2; exit 2; fi
